phase-summary.outcome: Content-pack generation now emits a portable manifest contract and schema/codegen artifacts. Space Explorer bundle builds include canonical content bindings and download a manifest alongside the bundle. Play-report API responses now always include a pack binding (from report or current bundle) for explicit traceability. Stat defaults include `Stamina` and `Mana`.

file.description: Reports now embed manifest and include canonical asset count in summary.
Accepts `contentBindings`, merges into `packs.spaceVectors`, and returns generated manifest.
Posts canonical bindings with bundle build requests; downloads manifest; adds stamina/mana defaults.
Adds authoritative `currentPackBinding` and backfills `report.packBinding` when missing.
Builds and writes `manifest`, `schema-bundle`, and TS/C++/C# model stubs per release version.
Uploads new manifest/schema/stub artifacts in CI.
Release artifact upload includes `.ts`, `.hpp`, and `.cs` generated stubs.
Updated assertions to validate manifest response from bundle build route.

tests.test: docs-site TypeScript typecheck passes after manifest/report/binding updates.
Release artifact script emits bundle/report/index + manifest/schema + TS/C++/C# stubs.
